segments.text: I hope you enjoyed yesterday's puja very much.
Today, i wanted to talk about certain matters
where people get quite confused
There are certain things we must understand in Sahaja Yoga
First point there is no fundamentalism
Nobody should use my words or say mother said so
Nobody.
That is how all these hierarchies have been built in the churches, everybody can read
every continuity and find out there's no way of controlling people by saying Mother
said so that shows you are trying to use My words tell People off You're not
I say it because this is heart-to-heart talk between my children and myself, you see.
And should not be just sent over through your computers all around the world without consulting
or censoring by their leader – there's no haste in Sahaja Yoga so that shouldn't
be done.
Now this I have said definitely, whatever
i've said nobody remembers only they use my name mother said so in 1970
never 1970 and ever spoken English
So all these historical utterances should not
used we live the present that time maybe
The situation was such I might have said something, but today the situation is different.
Maybe because Sahaja Yogis were just coming to Sahaj Yoga maybe they needed some sort
of a guideline – it's…it' s journey first off all!
It''s a journey you are passing supposing passing through a slope then we
to use a different type of method.
Now you are walking on plain land, then don't behave as if your climbing mountain so it's
journey – journey of Sahaja Yoga through our destination the destination is that
we have to emancipate maximum number human beings into sahaj yoga but should not be
I again tell you, nobody should take over things from the leaders.
I have appointed a leader just to coordinate with your people
but we always had direct relationship
So far all these people who believed in God
Had no direct connection
But now they do
So, why not use Me?
And if there are leaders you have to ask the leaders.
Nobody should take things upon themselves and start preaching people we don't like
preaching –we've had enough of it- There's no need for preach others If
You Have To Preach, Preach Yourself but Not To Others
One has to understand that it's a living process
we can understand from a cell at the
end of a root
It as intelligence
It is completely in
control
Of itself and it has direct connection
with
The divine power
So, its moves by itself
But attention on collective
Collective means the tree, it moves in such a direction that there is no argument.
There's not quarreling and since then there are no obstacles – moves!
Now supposing…
…there is big obstacle like stone which goes around it, encircles many times for
future tree that has to come. So from the past what do you get is a relative idea as
where have reached and form of your future, how far will go? This very important because
these things creep into western mind easily they don't want direct relations with
That's how then you'll start forming groups.
One person will stand up, mother says so finished one tent is raised another one say
Mother says somebody use my tapes anything there no need at all for to get these things
and listen them if they want create something should talk directly not do it themselves
on their own, which is a very wrong attitude towards Sahaja Yoga.
So first of all we must know it's the living process – you cannot put
in artificial types or things
that will curb growth for Sahajyoga
It' s really important to understand
There where I find
That people don't understand Sahaja Yoga
You can not mould into any pattern
It molds by itself, works by its self.
So we cannot have any hierarchy – never!
These hierarchies ultimately become a barrier between you and me which I don't like . All
the leaders are told that whatever letters to get ,whatever things
you have, You should send it over to Me.
I would like them myself but sometimes they do some of the leaders especially in Australia
had very bad experience
But now we've a wise leader here and a sensible person
i don't think there's anything wrong with him
only thing is rather too mild sometime
With someone
He should told
Yesterday he suffered so much because two ladies
because He never told them how horrible they were.
So I had to absorb all their nonsense quite a lot,
Because if the leader is not mild he'll sit on his head
If it's little strict we get after him
Only thing one has realize
That everything
Is living process
And through some sort of coordinator
Mother is trying to work out in a more simpler manner.
For example, if everybody writes me for small little thing – I mean they write everything
and must tell you absolutely something so useless sometimes that I really laugh there's
no need ask Me like mother we cannot get Indian spices here all these stupid things
Then second in about the husbands or about the wives
Because you should not see those films are those
televisions
Which if you say invariably show, they fight between husband and wife
So issue go on seeing that to be learned. You'll pick it up
It's like a parrot
Do know
We pick up all the words which have been said your husband harsh words out of your life
And then we work without that
And so many questions could have been easily solved. I think to work out the marriage is only
Question of a woman not, So much of man
Normally men don't want To marry normally though they Have no Responsibility They
Don'T have to produce children Anything but Still
they don't want to marry. They are sort of little bit afraid also, in the West especially
not India – men want to get married because somebody will spoil them who would never answer
then listen and be humble so that's why I have seen here a man doesn´t want to
You have to have marriages, but this marriage problem comes when women don't know how
to adjust.
Mainly I must tell you the first thing is that we really spoil your husbands actually
they should entirely depend on for everything then what will it do?
But in a loving manner not an oppressive way!
Do not demand anything, do not expect anything.
Just be gentle kind express your love
then they get used to it and can't live without
these tricks should have told you by
parents but may might been the same as
You are so
don´t know that tricks of trade
after marriage we
We have say we are we
shouldn's a I
And also understand
see men are different from women
They are different.
You're the preserver of society, they all the creator but you have to have much more
patience and compassion which we do not doubt that you must take your feminine qualities
I will be amazed at your Shakti for men
You are the power for men, that's why man must respect women.
If they don't respect woman not their romanticism and nonsense but as personality if
They dont' respect then they suffer every way especially materially.
Materially this suffer also reputation wise some women
Are extremely demanding an expecting too much perhaps maybe
they see those pictures of Romeo, Juliet and things like that.
But if you'll see Romeo-Juliet we will what Shakespeare wanted to communicate – he was
an avadhoota!
He wanted to communicate these are all futile enterprises both them died They could
never enjoy companionship We had so many problems in England also
So I told them what books you read
Most of the books are romance. All right, but Romance before marriage
There is no book about romance after the marriage
Can You imagine so naturally there's a problem
After-marriage is quarreling
Before-Marriage Romance
So why marry?
And when I said that man is the head of a family,
it doesn't mean that men should dominate women. Never!
You interpret also – sometimes
some brains are other way round
what was saying he's the Head Of The Family
Supposing i say He Is Your Leader
That does not means
He Should Dominate you
If Head Of The Family Starts Dominating
if the brain of body starts dominating
what will happen to this body? You stop it, to conclude like that. But you are the heart
of family! Brain can die but Heart dies last so try
understand there should be a complete integration between heart and brain
And children is attention in society of Sahaja Yoga
So here how we have such an idea if I say the head then he dominates
the heart.
How can it?
So they pick up few words from here and there,
And use for justifying their own weaknesses in Sahaja Yoga
But this kind of escape is not going to help you
To rise
You are against yourself
Is NOT for your benevolence
What I am telling you
is that if you try to accept all these outdated ideas in Sahaja Yoga,
will go down. You'll rot! No use coming into sahaja yoga
We are fresh we're new and
they are living
They don't accept this kind of idea about men or women
but when I said man the head
of the family, that doesn't mean that you dominate your wife and torture her.
Nor does it means that they leaders should dominate – never!
They should not dominate but use their wisdom , love or compassion to guide them in a
proper way."
I have received this letter which is very funny saying one leader's wife forbids
One of the Sahaja Yoginis not to come
To The House and to the program
Because I could Not go her house
Can you imagine?
This is absurd. Now if i tell Her
She'll be more harsh on that person
But by doing That she doesn't know how much
Is missing points in sahaja yoga
I mean,I am a whimsical Person
And can Go anywhere I feel like
Shes should have taken the blame upon Herself
If shes thinks I did not goto her house
instead of on the another person. Also, there's a thing that this is My house
This Is The Biggest
Nonsense Mother Should Come to my House
With Indian especially it's too much
Please come To my house mother
Come and have dinner with me
Who are you?
You're a Sahaja yogi so your house
is mine, you are Mine – everything's Mine. What it there to come your house? Then
You separate! This also an Indian mind I must confess My House this nonsense all Your houses
Are Mine if i go There doesn't mean that I love You more than anybody else. Doesn'
tmean That I have To Go Somewhere like somebody asked Me why did You take your birth in
I said, �I had to take my birth somewhere.� But better was for Christians because Christians
are absolutely fundamentalists mentally.
Mentally they're absolute fundamentalist – mentally that's more dangerous!
Muslims you can make them out there fundamentalism but they do not have the finesse about
it.
Openly They Are Fundamentalist and Christians very great fundamentalist.
But going to somebody's house now is becoming a problem for Me, because if I go to some
body else that person gets the ego she came into my home.
So again you are not say mother this My House Mother This Is Your House If i Go
There Well and Good ,If don't go there well good what does it matter?
Now Again I tell You nothing has be sent through your IBM or anything without the
consultation and censoring by the leader.
It can land me into great difficulties, tomorrow I could be in jail – why don't you understand
any?
You write whatever your feel like!
So this kind of irresponsible behaviour is…
…I cant' understand And things that are never said also
can be said, this shows immaturity and haste.
Such things should be consulted –and use your discretion- main thing is discretion
what you need to consult with the leader which are vitally important especially in
terms of written down or published things that circulate it's extremely important
to be seen by the leaders, there is no hurry about it.
Any book written any tapes to released anything should done with complete consent and understanding
of a leader I would say that he must sign those papers then i can hold him responsible
but if you are arbitrary start doing things than its could dangerous simple thing
They asked Me, Mother what do you think of starting a Vishwa Nirmala Dharma in Melbourne?
I said all right.
I didn't know that it's going to be an association or there is gonna be any election
and nothing just –I said alright-just start its'alright.
Vishva nirmala dharma is everywhere but they don''t have any associations anything
It's just a kind of society which is spreading Vishwa Nirmala Dharma.
There no sort any organization about it, we only have trust and don't want to have
electioning on all that again if some wrong type people get in then Sahaja Yoga will
be ousted completely so you can only have trust
And if you want to do something else,
You can form it separately.
But It should not be Vishwa Nirmala Dharma or Sahaja Yoga
Nothing doing
Because I said yes that doesn't mean
That we go so far with forming this
That association and all
Its a news
Alright whatever has been done
Has to rectified
Absolutely to be rectify
And we have to bring it down, to a proper level and should be there people who
Should Be elected as good People Who are in Sahaja Yoga.
Who Have so far been doing everything In A straight forward Manner
& who has Been very very sensible about It
There is also a suggestion that We should project ourselves To outside things
If it means that we have to go to other organizations, is wrong.
All these organizations are dead organization they're not living organization but if
They want come us all right
But We should Not Go and break our heads with them because you'll land up
not only with opposition, but you will catch from them negativity.
Try to understand we don't have to grow that fast
so as get all the lunatics in Sahaja Yoga
We need be very careful
You can only have sahajogis who are seekers
Who honest
Who humble
who do not want any money or power out of Sahaja Yoga.
It will grow, it has grown just imagine two people came from Australia and see how many
are there?
They'll definitely know no doubt but don't try to organize you cannot organize once
Once you start organizing, then the growth can be stunted like you have seen bonsai.
Bonsai when they cut it and organize is becomes a small tree but I haven't see any
trees which grows if its organized grow more never at most to nourish it or water
it, at the most you can see needs of this.
But You cannot just make It grow more!
All organizations cut The growth – in beginning it may look that by organizing it has increased
we say Christianity… what is This?
Like a pumpkin Has no meaning.
Absolutely empty hollow nonsense like Islam another Nonsense I mean they admit that
Islam is different from Muslims, it has been admitted now.
What is Buddhism?
Another nonsense!
So this kind of an artificial growth if you want to can take to artificial methods we
really want substantial people, substantial dharma innate within ourselves We don't have
take to these artificial things.
We are using lots of Artificial Manure now and people are revolting against it because
they think that all this artificial thing is harmful for us, so allow them work out
through the grace or divine power in a more natural manner than putting artificial organizations
artificial, this and that.
I think some of you must have been to Harvard or something
To learn how grow the business
And thats'how we tryto grow
But ultimately comes to recession
All those who had education in Howard
are responsible all overthe world
An allover the word there is a decision
i thing this university should be closed now
Maybe it will work, after so many years
about. So now, regarding your children I have been really studying the nature of Western
Children . Now The Nature Of Western Children Is that their attention is never on right
things not studies ,I should say Not at all on Studies. Now On Food Yes like in
Then they asked for baked beans in the morning.
Now these horribly tinned, baked beans which you have been giving to them are not at all
suitable for Indian climate and there no good!
You see if a western health of person I mean when go India get diarrhea –you cannot
You cannot stand heat, you can not stand cold.
Anything that changes we feel so much the sickness apart from all this time your tired
We must introspect little work will do and are tired I mean see in films or anywhere
I've seen even in the television, they'll come and sit down.
What work?
They have done it God knows all that time!
what is a reason?
The reason to think too much same with your marriages you start thinking –what
are my priorities?, what should i do?
Start analyzing just doing whatever we want this thinking through much is responsible
for your susceptibility to diseases
Of course Muladhara is one of the most important chakra, no doubt.
If the Muladhara has weak you can catch any disease for example cancer, AIDS, schizophrenia
UPS disease also the secret diseases herpes and all these things are very common in
of a strong Muladhara. So now first problem is how to strengthen your Muladhara? The second
one, the kind food you are eating here it's not so fresh try and eat fresh fruit at least
in Australia as far possible take two more carbohydrates if we're thinking too much
best is to take to carbohydrates. You are so much worried about putting on weight or this
thing, I don't know why you want be skinny what's the need? On contrary a person who
has little plumpness absorbs vibrations better but do that vibration sit in fat they sit
the fact and that's why they go on the nerves because nerve is made of fat, your brain
Is also Made Of Fat so this new idea of having
mosquitoes around
Sometimes you know I get frightened me.
i think next moment That person is going to fall On The ground
So whatever is pumped into Your head You accept
That's why the interpreneurs are definitely controlling, you have no idea because we don't
that wisdom to see.
Now they said all right – You shouldn't put any oil in your head!
All Right?
Never Put Any Oil So you become bald so They can sell wigs
All such things are there.
You can put oil before previous night just to make your hair grow properly, you must
give them nourishment – why do you starve then?
What's wrong with the oil I don't understand!
We should massage our body also by oil it is very important sometimes Saturday
if we use oil for massaging our bodies that would be a good idea and when we
look after yourself.
But just because there's a fashion not to put oil, so you'll just have any oil anywhere
near it."
They all used too put oil if see films about say thirty years back they were all nicely
nobody had dry hair or shining nice hair –they weren't supposed be quite good looking
and this bootish type of air then when we have-all the boots will take over
because they'll think, this is the head for Me.
So try to understand what's good for your body and what you should do?
Massaging Your Body Is a very Good Thing!
I Think Without I Oil I Cannot Exist Really Because My Work Is On Sahasrara And If
If I starve my hair, either will become completely bald or mad – one of the two.
It's very soothing to massage your head for your nerves everything and you are realized
souls there is vibrations flowing should massage your head nicely take about an hour
on a Saturday.
Saturday is the day of Shani, it's the Day of Saturn.
The day of Shri Krishna He so fonds butter and oil
all these small things should be understood
also you people are very found of sun I can understand that
but i don't know why in Australia
You're So Fond Of Sun when It Is SO much
But because its a fashion In West
We Are All Going To The Sun to see
and spoiling your skin. Your skin cannot have the gloom, while you see if
do not use sun bathing as some sort of a treatment it's all right there is lot
Sun can move about Indians used to wonder
about English they were saying that an English man
and a mad dog in the sun, even a sane dog won't go.
All such things should be understood
Personal hygiene also has to be seen
Use lot of water to wash your hands
And when you are using toilets
Water is used every time very important
Otherwise your Muladhara can never be alright
Your children I am surprised
They don´t want brush their teeth
They start crying if you tell them. You have to have a bath they start crying imagine in that
Speltering heat of India, but I don't want to have about and the smell
But when we tell him our parents also smell like their mouths well
In india at least twice
We must brush
once
The morning ones is the evening minimum
Evening time be all brush over teeth in it
Now, these are such small-small things which I think our culture in India has already taught
us long time back.
We don't have to tell anyone like that they say what you're telling is nonsense
but we should be fond of doing this so the way it's when your children growing
take them into bathroom make a fun out if now let see will brush teeth you brush
I'll brush my teeth now see who's are whiter like that make a fun out of it
You, or the one. Who can teach them good?
Hygiene then bathing all these little things
Are very important for you and for your children so
The hygiene part is
Very poor personal hygiene
Of course your houses will be clean absolutely if anything falls on
the carpet, immediately you'll pick it up because this carpet may be sold later on.
Whatever is sellable we look after!
Now your teeth also can be sellable –you need not neglect them but will not be careful
whatever is saleble are very carefull-your house very carefully ,your carpets very
But whatever is not sellable, it's not worth anything.
Now in Sahaja Yoga we should know that nothing is saleable – what ever you have and own
will keep with ourselves or give to our children as presents for others they are
going to sell everything everybody is a seller house has been sold very particular about
the houses if something goes wrong he'll shout at you
We were surprised that these children who are more careful about nonsensical things
like carpets than their teeth.
Something fell down on the carpet, immediately they all rushed and cleaned up the carpet
so we started wondering what's matter with them?
That is not there job!
There training have whatever sellable try to put right
So, we must change our mind and say that whatever be own you are not going to sell it or sometimes
have to sell the house all right.
That's also important in any way whether a house is clean of dirty you will face same
price –that my experience-whether you decorate on the contrary undecorated houses
they like because their ego very surprising We had bought a house in Houseloom and one
I belonged to one of the Sahaja Yoginis, one side to Me.
And no time for decorating or anything
and she poor thing spent so much money
To decorate it all that
some people lived also
Of course She made little money out
whatever
But My house sold
For a higher price than hers
Why? They said
It's already done
We can't do anything about
So Also The Ego is there
That we should be able
Do something
In the House
And thus it doesn't make difference, in any way they don´t pay for your carpets and
do not pay you things.
But people are so particular about their furniture ,about everything . So now this
is what materialism is absolute materialism that we try to get thing just for selling
off on the contrary
We have to look out what are the beautiful things made by hand.
What can we have?
Whatever is make-by-hand, by people – you know how few!
And that be given your children through the progeny also sometimes…the idea of
antique who's this child please take away..who' s a child crying..you must find
why the child is crying in My program, must be something wrong.
Must some bada.
If a child cries In my presence or he's afraid
that means there are sort of badas which you should try to remove
so now we have change our attitude towards ourselves
We're specially blessed people
You've got look after your body
Look After Your children
We have to look after things which are of much greater importance than material thing.
That is the Spirit, so ultimately we come up with a point that the spirit has given
us all this beauty – it's just giving such moonlight in our life and sunshine
in our work, which has made us so sweet.
After all what we have done for the Spirit to satisfy it –to enjoy It?
So most important thing is Our spirit and We should seek comfort of The Spirit!
More you think about Your Spirit ,the deeper You will go and the joy You'll get will
be also very deep and you'll settle down, very nicely embedded in spirituality.
So You have to all the time think am I doing this for my spiritual growth?
In a place like England people get up at four o'clock to meditate – nothing do
it!
This times there was big number…I told so many English that you've been coming
everytime to Ganpatipuraya can we not reduce your numbers they felt really sad
Mother, we need it.
We have to go."
But I said this time you can avoid there are so many people coming if they're too
much because about hundred and fifty came from other countries who were not even paying
or who weren't such Sahaja Yogis.'
So i said that'we've got work out with them'.
They said,"Mother but..
..We cant help it.
We have be there.
You cannot do without It".
So this kind of understanding, I'm so happy that you all managed to come
All these way here. You are settled so well
Living in tents and enjoying
This discomfort because we have got the comfort
Of your heart, Comfort
Of Your Spirit
As it is We've suddenly come up
Very high up And whatever i said yesterday
was not in any way to pamper your vanity but the truth.
I just told you, The Truth is truth for at least 95% people of Sahaja Yoga
But they should also go deeper and deeper
And enjoy themselves
& Enjoy their collectivity
Now In general i can talk about things
That firstly that
You have ask your leaders
If you have to do anything extraordinary, now is your discretion and the last but not
least.
Is this all readers complain that no one wants pay any money whatsoever for Sahaja Yoga?
Now see actually as we know whatever money You give me for Poojas I buy silver for and
you are given the equal amount of silver as one would give to Europeans.
But,as far is Pujamanis concerned it's very low first they used just gave me 1 dollar
off course that was all in coins which I have brought back but otherwise whatever
is there, I'm not using it for Myself –I don't need It.
I should normally because its given to Me but i just thought that instead of That if
If give you silver You will have silver for puja which very important and
And that it would be very auspicious
But the way people want pay is rather reluctant
I agree that you people are now running into problem about money, but maybe one of the reasons
may be that.
Do You know?
You pay lowest in whole world – no-one pays so low as them!
At least they paid 21 and 11 even India anyway…
So whatever it is …whatever suits to ..I am not going say anything whether you collect
less or more I am going to give you the silver because You are so many people, now have do
it.
And always put maximum amount between You and Europe –You're also a continent as
Europe is but one has understand that at least we should really think of doing something
for Sahaja Yoga what can We Do For Sahaja Yoga?
As you know very well that I've used My husband's money quite a lot
and again,I'm going to work out something in Australia
because i think In Australia it will be
Very good for people
And can involve my money with them
But despite all this
People don't understand why My husband allows Me
To do so
Because He knows It gives Him all the blessings
He told Me many a times, he told group of people and openly to Sahaja Yogis that all
these awards I have got because my wife but she is working for God.
But i wanted also you donated lot money it's the generosity if You donate then
you get it also from another thing, but I don't want for my personal things at all.
But is a sign of your generosity that this common think form the leaders Melbourne leader
says nobody wants to pay only they take advantage of Sahaja Yoga This not very good
from Lakshmi point of view. Also one has to understand that once you join Sahaja Yoga,
whether pay or not-pay anything –you think your are a liability! That's very normal
also for every small thing they want help. Of course there have be helped we try
people who haven't got money but then become sort of liabilities and
Then they expect so much from other Sahaja Yogis or for me also, that one can't understand
anything.
You marry someone then the person becomes a headache – letters after letters, telephones
after telephones, it's not proper.
Of course some child is sick all right you can inform him but a child he hot tempered
misbehaving on my head maybe You have been hot-tempered may be You are fighting with
your wife or Your Wife Is Fighting With You May Be That Why Not Correct that part
even the smallest thing they think should done by Sahaja Yoga.
Sahaja Yoga must look after these things, Sahaj yoga must do that.
So one should understand
That to you sahaja yoga is a liability
not You are reliability to sahaja yoga
Thats the best attitude
Of course in away YOU ARE a liability
But what should be your attitude?
Now you have matured enough
When The son grows up and matures
Then he looks After his parents
In same way
You Have To Look after sahaja yoga
then sahaja yoga looking after all time
time and pestering Sahaja Yogis about it.
This has to be understood very well that sahaja yoga is not liable for you, YOU are liable
for sahajoga!
Sahaja Yoga has given You so much – God's done SO MUCH FOR YOU!
What have We done for God?
Always think like this…
If we start thinking in such a way the more work you put into sahaja yoga ,the more
you exert your mind for Sahaja Yoga, in a proper living balanced manner the more you
are helped.
The more grow and enjoy it's like that!
And so todays lecture is all of us in way because I don't know what applies to whom
but we should not put on somebody else take if yourself that we arenot going to be
on Sahaja Yoga but a support. We have to look after Sahaja Yoga, which is very-very beautiful
attitude – that's my attitude is I don't need Sahaj yoga at all! Not At All! Why do
i need? I Don' t Have To Do Sahaja Yoga But I Am Worried About Sahaja Yoga about
Sahaja Yogis .To Me They Are My Liabilities ,I Have To Look After Them, I Have To Worry
all that, I mean this kind of work if somebody has to do nobody would accept.
In every way have support because my spirit gets satisfied is for the satisfaction – My
own satisfaction!
Am not doing it your satisfaction am going from My own satisfaction selfishness so
when you reach selfhood You will understand what this self needs and put Your mind
And you will be surprised that when you start doing something for others,
For Sahaja Yoga it's very much rewarding.
Very much like a prayer!
Everything is the prayer in Sahaj yoga
Whatever we do for sahaja yoga
Is a prayer
It' s report
Its oneness with God
It what can call the worship
And once you start doing that, it will not bother as to who criticizes You or what people
say.
Nothing!
But we'll feel such relationship and understand I'm sure this Shiv Puja definitely establish
at a much higher level –I am so-and he would know where are very happy about
that a Shiv Puja was arranged here.
Once it was arranged in Europe,
It all full of storms and snowfall
And everything but so many came to Rome for the Shiv Pooja
They asked Me Mother we should have one Shiv puja
The whole thing is so surprising
That people come from Greece and everywhere
Driving down I don't know
There were always reports of snow fall
there, a flood is their and they were all there.
And suddenly I found the level at reason because here we are in direct contact with our spirit
– Here you know about your Spirit We're obliged to Our Spirit what it has done
to us, we respect it and that's how I've seen the certain change.
And a very great height suddenly they achieved!
Now forget your small differences fighting for power, fighting
for money, nonsense – try to be alright. There's some people who got caught up because
of this non-sense in Melbourne they should all cleanse themselves out put themself right
and look after their self All my blessings with you May God bless
You
So I'll be bidding you farewell At the parting i want give something small
for all the leaders, because I want them to write
The Diary. It is for other leaders
apart from our main leader
–the national leader– this it's for everyone
